assumptions: The question concerns the IFRS 9 classification of a financial asset whose contractual terms may alter the timing or amount of cash flows.

approaches.label: Amortised cost
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context links the SPPI condition in paragraph 4.1.2(b) to eligibility for measurement at amortised cost.

approaches.label: Fair value through other comprehensive income
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context links the SPPI condition in paragraph 4.1.2A(b) to eligibility for measurement at fair value through other comprehensive income.

approaches.label: Fair value through profit or loss
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context states that when contractual cash flows do not meet the SPPI condition or cannot satisfy the relevant requirements, the financial asset is measured at fair value through profit or loss.
